case_title: MA, COLIN VS BEASCY, ADRIS GIBSON

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY MA, COLIN AS TO DEFENDANT BEASCY, ADRIS GIBSON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-20-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY BEASCY, ADRIS GIBSON AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT MA, COLIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-20-2006 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MA, COLIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BEASCY, ADRIS GIBSON $3,337.50 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,442.50, THE COURT DETERMINES PLAINTIFF'S DAMAGES TO BE $2,700 FOR PROPERTY LOSS, AND $1,750 FOR GENERAL PLUS SPECIAL DAMAGES FOR PERSONAL INJURY. THE COURT ATTRIBUTE 20% COMPARATIVE FAULT TO PLAINTIFF; THE JUDGMENT IS A NET AWARD (PLAINTIFF WAIVES SERVICE OF DEFENDANT'S CLAIM). STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT MA, COLIN DEFENDANT'S CLAIM DISMISSED; DEFENDANT AND CROSS PLAINTIFF IS NOT THE REGISTERED OWNER OF THE SUBJECT CADILLAC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BEASCY, ADRIS GIBSON
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT BEASCY, ADRIS GIBSON
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 28259, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED
